channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Albanian protesters pelt lawmakers’ cars over resort projects
item.description: Protesters threw eggs at lawmakers' vehicles outside Albania's parliament, demanding changes to laws.

item.title: FIFA investigating on-pitch brawl after Spain vs Argentina World Cup final
item.description: Argentina's Paredes was seen shoving Spanish players, which led to an on-field melee, while Spain's Yamal prayed calmly.

item.title: Trump rejects Mamdani threat to arrest Israel’s Netanyahu for war crimes
item.description: US president insists Netanyahu will not be arrested, despite ICC warrant.

item.title: King of Spain celebrates World Cup winners in Madrid
item.description: Spain’s World Cup-winning team received a royal reception from King Felipe VI in Madrid ahead of a victory parade.

item.title: Gaza residents weigh in on election of new Hamas leader
item.description: Gaza residents weigh in on election of new Hamas leader

item.title: How will Zelenskyy handle the growing political crisis at home?
item.description: Ukraine strikes Russian oil sites after major missile attack, as President Zelenskyy faces crisis over sacked minister.

item.title: Ortega insists no more elections for Nicaragua
item.description: The Central American state's longtime leader intends to block the opposition from challenging his rule.

item.title: Man arrested after fire outside New York immigration court
item.description: A man has been arrested after setting off an incendiary device outside an immigration court building in New York City.

item.title: Monsoon-driven flash flooding kills at least 20 in Afghanistan
item.description: Rescue teams are racing to reach Nuristan province as devastation continues across the region.

item.title: Indian police attack Cockroach Janta Party’s parliament march
item.description: Police used batons to disperse protesters as thousands of people joined the Cockroach Janta Party's march in New Delhi.

item.title: Iran condemns US attacks on civilian infrastructure
item.description: Iran says it has received mediation proposals from multiple parties and insists diplomatic efforts remain active.

item.title: What does Khalil al-Hayya’s election win mean for Gaza?
item.description: Al-Hayya wins Hamas leadership with a single-vote margin, signalling a focus on Gaza amidst continued Israeli aggression

item.title: Yemeni women support families through enterprise as economic crisis bites
item.description: Amid Yemen’s harsh economic crisis, securing viable employment has become increasingly difficult for men.

item.title: EU pauses methane penalties amid energy crisis, US pressure
item.description: The European Commission says waiving penalties will ensure the security of energy supply.

item.title: US judge orders pause on Paramount–Warner Bros merger
item.description: Paramount risks $650m quarterly fees if merger delays extend beyond September, as per the merger agreement terms.

item.title: A tournament of contradictions: What did we learn at World Cup 2026?
item.description: A look back at the World Cup's moments of glory and controversy, and their impact on fans, teams and the sport.

item.title: Protests in Italy after Moroccan man dies during arrest
item.description: Outrage across Italy's political spectrum following death in Bologna likened to killing of George Floyd in 2020.

item.title: Houthis announce maritime blockade on Saudi Arabia
item.description: Yemen’s Iran-backed Houthi rebels have announced a maritime blockade on Saudi Arabia after the two sides traded fire

item.title: Trump vows Iran will ‘pay’ for killing US soldiers
item.description: The US intensifies air strikes on Iran, targeting critical sites after the deaths of American soldiers in the region.

item.title: ‘Now or never’: Students defy Delhi lockdown to march on India’s parliament
item.description: Youth-led protesters answer call of Cockroach Janta Party to demand accountability, sweeping reforms after exam scandal.

item.title: Petrol prices climb as US–Iran tensions disrupt markets
item.description: US petrol prices reach $4.00 per gallon (3.78 litres), marking the second week of increased costs for consumers.

item.title: FIFA World Cup: Five key takeaways from 2026 edition won by Spain
item.description: Spain beat Argentina, but talking points remain. Should there be 48 or 64 teams? Hydration breaks? The 'dark arts'?

item.title: Mexican drug lord Ismael ‘El Mayo’ Zambada sentenced to life in US prison
item.description: US judge hands life sentence to Ismael Zambada for leading one of Mexico's most violent drug cartels for decades.

item.title: Spain team arrives home after winning the World Cup
item.description: World champions Spain have landed home carrying the World Cup trophy a day after defeating Argentina in the final.

item.title: Israeli air strike injures 14 in Gaza City
item.description: An Israeli air strike on Gaza City injured at least 14 people, according to Gaza health officials.
